metadata.title: RoomSwift | The Future of Hospitality Operations
metadata.description: A premium QR-first operations platform for smart hotels and modern restaurants.

guest.noRequests: No active requests for this order point.
guest.requestError: Failed to place request. Please try again.
guest.noLiveOrdersDescription: Place a request to see the live timeline update here.
guest.connectedDescription: Experience the full operational flow by opening the staff dashboards on another device.

hotSellers.title: Hot Sellers
hotSellers.subtitle: Top food picks based on live order counts.
hotSellers.empty: Hot sellers will appear after food orders are placed.

feedback.title: How was this order?
feedback.subtitle: Your feedback helps the team improve service quality.
feedback.commentPlaceholder: Tell us what went well or what could improve...
feedback.error: Feedback could not be saved right now.
feedback.noFeedback: No guest feedback has been submitted yet.

supabase.fallbackDescription: Supabase env vars are missing, so RoomSwift is using local fallback data for the expo preview.

install.title: Install RoomSwift
install.description: Save the demo to your home screen for a smoother expo walkthrough.

home.headline: Hospitality,
home.description: RoomSwift is a premium QR-driven platform for smart hotels and modern restaurants. Streamline orders, automate service requests, and empower your team with realtime operational dashboards.
home.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to run a high-performance dining or hotel operation.
home.pricingDescription: Choose the perfect plan for your establishment. Whether you're a boutique cafe or a luxury hotel chain, we have you covered.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to elevate your guest UX?
home.ctaDescription: Join the smart hotels and restaurants building the next generation of hospitality experiences with RoomSwift.
home.copyright: 2026 RoomSwift Smart Hospitality Systems. All rights reserved.

qrFirst.title: QR-First Experience
qrFirst.description: Guests scan a room-specific QR code to open a beautifully optimized ordering suite. No apps, no friction.

realtime.title: Realtime Operations
realtime.description: Kitchen and Valet teams receive requests instantly. Realtime updates keep guests informed at every step.

staff.title: Staff Orchestration
staff.description: Dedicated dashboards for separate fulfillment streams. Move requests from pending to delivered with ease.

insights.title: Manager Insights
insights.description: Track performance, hot items, and room activity in a unified analytics-style manager dashboard.

guest.title: Guest Room UI
guest.description: A premium mobile-first dining and service menu.

kitchen.title: Kitchen Ops
kitchen.description: Live food queue for rapid preparation and flow.

manager.title: Executive View
manager.description: Analytics and control for the management layer.

essential.name: Essential
essential.description: Perfect for single-property boutique hotels and restaurants looking to simplify guest requests.

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: Our most popular plan for high-volume hotels requiring multi-team orchestration.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Dedicated infrastructure and support for large-scale hotel groups and resort chains.

staffPortal.title: Staff Portal
staffPortal.description: Select your operations department to access the live request queue and fulfillment dashboard.
staffPortal.kitchenDescription: Handle food preparation, track order status, and coordinate with the service team in realtime.
staffPortal.valetDescription: Manage housekeeping, maintenance, and guest service requests through a unified operational view.

qrDemo.title: Room QR Showcase
qrDemo.description: Print these room stickers for your university expo table. Each QR opens the guest web app instantly without login or app installation.
qrDemo.setup: Suggested demo setup: print Room 101 and Room 102, place them on your expo booth, and use the "Scan to test" button to quickly validate the flow before presenting.

offline.title: RoomSwift is temporarily offline
offline.description: Your device appears to be offline. Once the network is back, refresh the page to resume guest requests and realtime staff updates.

notFound.title: Room not found
notFound.description: The requested RoomSwift page could not be found. Use the demo room below to keep the presentation moving.

kitchen.title: Food preparation command center
kitchen.description: Accept, prepare, and complete live food orders from rooms and restaurant tables.

valet.title: Room service and fulfillment flow
valet.description: Handle housekeeping, maintenance, water, towels, and delivery-style service requests from one live operations queue.

operations.emptyDescription: No {{team}} requests found for this filter.

toast.tryAgain: Please try again in a moment.

staffDashboard.title: Live request operations
staffDashboard.description: Monitor all incoming requests, accept tasks quickly, and update status in realtime for the guest room view.

stats.totalTodayDetail: All requests created during today's demo session.
stats.completedDetail: Finished tasks visible on guest pages.

staffDashboard.emptyDescription: New room orders and service calls will appear here in realtime.

menu-1.name: Club Sandwich
menu-1.description: Toasted triple-layer sandwich with fries and a house dip.

menu-2.name: Chicken Biryani
menu-2.description: Aromatic basmati rice with spiced chicken and raita.

menu-3.name: Zinger Burger
menu-3.description: Crispy chicken burger with lettuce, cheese, and chili mayo.

menu-4.name: Tea
menu-4.description: Freshly brewed tea served in-room with biscuits.

menu-5.name: Coffee
menu-5.description: Smooth coffee with optional milk and sugar.

menu-6.name: Fresh Lime
menu-6.description: Chilled lime drink for a refreshing afternoon break.

service-1.name: Water Bottle
service-1.description: Request chilled mineral water for the room.

service-2.name: Extra Towels
service-2.description: Fresh towels delivered to your room.

service-3.name: Room Cleaning
service-3.description: Housekeeping support for quick room refresh.

service-4.name: Maintenance Help
service-4.description: Technical issue support for AC, TV, lights, or fixtures.

service-5.name: Wake-up Call
service-5.description: Set a morning call reminder from reception.

service-6.name: Tea Setup
service-6.description: Tea tray setup with cups, kettle, and sugar sachets.

demoSetup.title: Production Demo Setup
demoSetup.description: Separate operational zones make the expo flow feel like a real hotel SaaS: guests on room links, kitchen on food prep, valet on service fulfillment, and manager on room control plus analytics.

header.title: Hotel control center
header.description: Production-style manager space for room QR management, team visibility, hotel analytics, and expo-ready operational control.

qr.title: QR Management
qr.heading: Generate hotel room and restaurant table QR codes
qr.description: Hotel QR codes route guests to `/room/101`. Restaurant QR codes route diners to `/table/T01`, where only food ordering is enabled.
qr.empty: Create or select an ID to generate its unique QR code.

teams.kitchenDescription: Monitor kitchen throughput, prep flow, and active dining requests.
teams.valetDescription: Track water, towels, cleaning, and in-room service fulfillment from one queue.
teams.guestDescription: Jump directly to a live guest room route and validate the QR ordering journey.

analytics.emptyDescription: Create a few guest requests to populate the manager presentation cards.

side.responseDescription: Average delivery or completion turnaround based on request timestamps.
side.reportDescription: This placeholder is designed for expo demos. It suggests PDF export, shift summary, and occupancy insights without adding backend complexity.

sidebarServices.title: Available Services
sidebarServices.description: Manager-side quick view of currently available guest-facing services and menu items.
